dimensions.policy: canonical evidence must match in CI
schema and semantic evidence must match

determinism.numeric_policy: protocol semantics use integer units and require exact equality; calibrated statistical outputs compare declared bounds, never hidden float tolerances

accounting.fidelity: Wire evidence uses executable production codec; protocol fidelity is individually modeled semantic state; compute fidelity is operation-counted compute; scale uses individual nodes across 12 represented nodes; Bloom fidelity uses exact Bloom bits. No approximation metadata applies.

projections.name: serialized frame bytes
projections.evidence: causal ledger and executable frame evidence

projections.name: transmitted wire bytes
projections.evidence: per-edge transmitted equals delivered plus lost

projections.name: resource work
projections.evidence: each executed work item has a resource receipt

exclusions: lower-layer host networking not represented by configured transport overhead
daemon metrics absent from telemetry remain unobserved

support_matrix.evidence: not in v0.1 build or determinism matrix

threat_controls: artifact size limits and schema validation
no plugin execution in the analysis browser
container harness has explicit network and host boundaries
release bundles exclude secrets and host paths
limitations: daemon agreement is limited to metrics exposed by the pinned harness
one-billion-node results are cohort or hybrid, never individual
calibrated performance applies only to its recorded hardware profile
